message:
feat(service): add steer and filter service combinators (asupersync-35vis)

Steer: routes requests to one of N services via a picker function.
Filter: rejects requests that fail a sync predicate with FilterLayer.
AsyncFilter: async predicate variant (structure only). Steer: 11 tests.
Filter: 17 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
